features: ESSENTIAL SKIN CARE: Nuage Aqueous Cream is essential to any home. The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round.
GENTLE: Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free, the aqueous cream is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use.
SKIN COMFORT: Nuage Aqueous Cream is a non-greasy moisturiser. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months.
LIPS & SKIN: Suitable for use on the body and to treat and prevent dry chapped lips.
description: Product Description Nuage Aqueous Cream is essential to any home. The hydrating capability along with the light, non-greasy formulation helps dry skin all year round. Dermatologically tested, lanolin free and fragrance free. The aqueous cream is effectively ointment and water combined to produce a moisturiser for everyone to use. Nuage Aqueous Cream is a non-greasy moisturise. Perfect for treating very dry skin; particularly dermatitis, eczema, chapped sore skin especially during winter months. Suitable for use on the body and to treat and prevent dry chapped lips. Nuage is a trusted popular brand, search amazon.co.uk to view other available products. Large, contains 500ml. Ingredients Aqua, Petrolatum, Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Phenoxyethanol. Manufacturer Contact Information Swirl Consumer Products Ltd., Manchester, M4 6AF. See more
